title: lepidium kajii
intro: Lepidium kajii is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family and is commonly known as a wild or desert cress. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders such as bloating and indigestion. Lepidium kajii is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and supporting immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used topically, and it can also be consumed raw in salads or as a sprout.
